settings.title: Settings
settings.ispSpeedDesc: Enter your ISP plan speed for comparison
settings.privacyDesc: All tests run locally. No data leaves your device.

help.title: Help & FAQ
help.whatIsDownloadDesc: Download speed measures how quickly data travels from the internet to your device. Higher is better.
help.whatIsUploadDesc: Upload speed measures how quickly data travels from your device to the internet. Important for video calls and uploads.
help.whatIsPingDesc: Ping measures the round-trip time for data to travel to a server and back. Lower is better for gaming and video calls.
help.whatIsJitterDesc: Jitter measures variation in ping times. Lower jitter means a more stable connection.
help.whatIsPacketLossDesc: Packet loss measures the percentage of data packets that fail to arrive. Any packet loss can impact quality.
help.whatIsBufferbloatDesc: Bufferbloat is excess latency caused by network equipment buffering too much data. Lower is better.
